name: The Deep Learning Era
summary: The era that changed everything — triggered by AlexNet's crushing victory in the 2012 ImageNet competition. Deep neural networks trained on GPUs proved they could demolish decades of hand-engineered computer vision. The entire field pivoted. AlphaGo stunned the world by defeating the world Go champion. GANs opened the door to generative AI. Word embeddings (Word2Vec) transformed NLP. And the three godfathers of deep learning — Hinton, LeCun, Bengio — were vindicated after decades of working against the mainstream.
defining_characteristics: AlexNet proves deep learning works — the entire field pivots
GPU computing becomes essential infrastructure for AI research
GANs introduce adversarial training for generative models
AlphaGo defeats Lee Sedol — a milestone thought to be decades away
The attention mechanism emerges, setting the stage for transformers
Deep learning moves from academic curiosity to industry standard
